store_short_desc.message: Hide Google's AI summaries & co. AI when you ask for it, not forced on by default. Free, open source, anonymous.

icon_tooltip.message: Hallu Block — switch off the AI nobody asked for.

tagline.message: AI only when you ask for it.

counter_label.message: AI summaries & widgets cleared this week

toggle_google_overview_sub.message: The block Google plants at the top of your results (AI Overviews).

toggle_slop_sub.message: Pushes sites with AI-generated content out of your results.

toggle_ddg_sub.message: The AI summary at the top of the results.

toggle_amazon_sub.message: The AI that sums up customer reviews.

toggle_show_blocks_label.message: Show the AI blocks you skipped

toggle_show_blocks_sub.message: A small tag where the hidden content was.

radical_sub.message: The ten links, nothing else. Zero AI… but zero weather, maps or calculator either.

foot_brand.message: Made by Hallu World, the newsletter amazed by AI and appalled by what we do with it →

foot_privacy.message: No data ever leaves your browser.

annot_generic.message: AI content hidden by Hallu Block

annot_google_overview.message: Google's AI summary hidden by Hallu Block

annot_slop.message: Result skipped: site flagged "AI content" by the community list

onboard_title.message: Pick the AI content you want to hide

onboard_body.message: Hallu Block hides the AI that sites shove at you without asking: Google's summaries, buttons all over the place, fully AI-generated sites, and the rest. We've switched on the essentials already. Everything is one click away: keep what works for you, cut the rest. Nothing leaves your browser. We don't track you, we don't sell anything, we don't collect anything.

state_nothing.message: Nothing to flag here. Enjoy the quiet.

state_error_google.message: Google has tinkered with its layout again, so this filter might miss a few things — we're on it. In the meantime, classic Google mode (still reliable) is right there.

state_all_off.message: All filters are off. Hallu Block isn't doing anything right now.
